mapper.sql: mr.id AS mr_id, mr.report_type AS mr_report_type, mr.title AS mr_title, mr.description AS mr_description, mr.findings AS mr_findings, mr.recommendations AS mr_recommendations, mr.created_at AS mr_created_at, mr.updated_at AS mr_updated_at, p.id AS p_id, pu.id AS pu_id, pu.name AS pu_name, pu.mobile_number AS pu_mobile_number, pu.email AS pu_email, pu.role AS pu_role, pu.is_active AS pu_is_active, pu.created_at AS pu_created_at, pu.updated_at AS pu_updated_at, d.id AS d_id, du.id AS du_id, du.name AS du_name, du.mobile_number AS du_mobile_number, du.email AS du_email, du.role AS du_role, du.is_active AS du_is_active, du.created_at AS du_created_at, du.updated_at AS du_updated_at, a.id AS a_id, a.code AS a_code, a.appointment_date AS a_appointment_date, a.start_time AS a_start_time, a.end_time AS a_end_time, a.status AS a_status

FROM medical_reports mr JOIN patients p ON p.id = mr.patient_id JOIN users pu ON pu.id = p.user_id JOIN doctors d ON d.id = mr.doctor_id JOIN users du ON du.id = d.user_id LEFT JOIN appointments a ON a.id = mr.appointment_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO medical_reports ( patient_id, doctor_id, appointment_id, report_type, title, description, findings, recommendations, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{patient.id}, #{doctor.id}, #{appointment.id}, #{reportType}, #{title}, #{description}, #{findings}, #{recommendations}, NOW(6), NOW(6) )
mapper.update: UPDATE medical_reports SET patient_id = #{patient.id}, doctor_id = #{doctor.id}, appointment_id = #{appointment.id}, report_type = #{reportType}, title = #{title}, description = #{description}, findings = #{findings}, recommendations = #{recommendations}, updated_at = NOW(6) WHERE id = #{id}
